notes:
Game did not run natively (wasn't listed as supporting Linux  on steam store page so I'm not sure why it gave me the option to on steam and is listed here as native)
Game does seem to run just fine after forcing use of proton 4.2-9
title: Headliner: NoviNews

notes:
When I first started the game it had a flickering white-grayish screen and was not able to be played. After changing the preference file at
 
"~/.config/unity3d/Unbound\ Creations/Headliner_\ NoviNews/prefs"

to my native screen resolution, the game works fine. 
More info at:
 https://steamcommunity.com/app/918820/discussions/0/1777136225031326027/
title: Headliner: NoviNews
